home.title: The platform that professionalizes your simracing championships
home.subtitle: Centralize leagues, seasons, races, results, penalties, and protests in a clean modern interface.
home.cardCalendarDescription: Plan every round with race settings, schedule, and registration status.
home.cardResultsDescription: Publish race results and automate driver/team points in a few clicks.
home.cardStewardDescription: Process protests, apply penalties, and keep a transparent history.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to launch your next season?

app.title: RaceControl space
app.subtitle: Your connected workspace to manage leagues, track upcoming races, and control championship decisions.
app.cardLeaguesDescription: Create or join leagues, manage roles, and visibility.
app.cardCalendarDescription: Organize rounds, open registrations, and adjust event formats.
app.cardStewardDescription: Enter results, recalculate standings, and manage penalties/protests.
